violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in freezer. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2025

The sink used for food preparation (dump sink) is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine #2) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off during inspection to be cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front of location closest to the street, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit gaskets and bottom compartment and ice machine #1 have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
